title: Level 248
wikitext:
__NOTOC__ {{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 248: "New Britain"}}
Warning! Information leak detected. We will try to resolve this shortly. This message can trigger if you have illegal extensions (such as [[Level 248/7h37ru7h.net|TruthOf.ext]]) installed. Please consider disabling them.

==TruthOf.ext== TruthOf.ext has found 1 file(s): > Access "Dare.txt"> Accessed "Dare.txt" in Section "Manufacturing_District" > Close "TruthOf.ext"
Home of the [[Royal Exploration Unit]]. {{User:Chrisonmagic/ClassREU|Environment=0|Entities=0|Entities Text=Controlled Entity Presence|Resources=5|Class Text=Our Home}} Level 248 is the 249th level of the Backrooms. ==Description:== Level 248 is a pleasant island on a saltwater ocean in the exact shape of Great Britain from [[The Frontrooms]]. The level even had some naturally occurring metals. Thanks to the efforts of the R.E.U, infrastructure has taken place. The level is populated with members of the R.E.U. who will take in any immigrants from other levels and incorporate them into New Britain if they desire. Thanks to the extraction of metals, we use pounds, shillings and pence as currency as [[Object 1|Almond Water]] is a little too bulky to use. Level 248 also has a railway system, connecting the level's different Districts together with steam trains. {{Blurimage|file=British_Map.png|caption=A Map of New Britain}} There are 9 Districts in the colony: *Mining District. (M.N.D.) *Manufacturing District. (M.F.D.) *Agriculture District. (A.D.) *Lumber District. (L.D.) *Power District. (P.D.) *Transportation District. (T.D.) *Naval District. (N.D.) *Military District. (M.T.D.) *Capital District. (C.D.) ===Mining District:=== The new Mining District is the source of all the stone and metal in the [[Royal Exploration Unit]]. ===Manufacturing District:=== Our Manufacturing District is populated by towering factories, forgeries and refineries which produce tools, equipment and weaponry. The workers share their residences with the Agriculture District in order to avoid the smoke produced by the buildings. This is where our currency is manufactured as well. Food production does not take place here, it takes place in the Agriculture District. Carpentry also takes place in another district, the Lumber District.
10/04/2026 09:52. Break-in at Location Alan. 1 [[Object 3|Rad-Class]] experimental weapon stolen. Addendum: We've never had [[Object 3|Rad-Class]] weapons outside of government buildings. We need to find the culprit. 11/04/2026 11:11. Several people have died to [[Object 3]]. We're classifying them all as murder and hiding the source. Nobody should know what's gotten out. If they aren't all the same person, we are beyond fucked.
===Agriculture District:=== Our Agriculture District is populated by city-spanning fields of wheat and corn. Dotted around the fields are large wooden structures: seed silos, food storage and barn-sized communal housing. Near the west side of the Agriculture District, are several kitchens which produce food for the rest of the colony such as ready made sandwiches. ===Lumber District:=== Our Lumber District is a large wooded area of New Britain populated by large logging operations, carpentry workshops and tree nurseries. The Lumber District is in charge of the manufacturing of wooden products. Small cabins for logging groups are spotted around the forest. ===Power District:=== The Power District is a fortified district that contains industrial-sized steam engines that ran solely on lumber, now obsolete as the level now imports power from other levels. The district now focuses on managing imported power, serving as a hub for electrical maintenance dispatches. Several power plants have now been converted into large data-processing office for some of the companies in the Capital District. Also the main location for radio stations and the main broadcasting network of the R.E.U.. Buy CABLE and BACKNET TV Services Today! *Sponsored by Royal Backrooms Cable and Connection Service Limited.
Open Incident: 83–P4
Close Incident: 83–P4
01/01/2026 00:07. The main power facility was raided and extensive damage was dealt to the facilities in the building. Several people were then thrown into the malfunctioning equipment. Of 156 bodies recovered, 2 were identified. One of which was the facility overseer and the other was a technician. 34 had to be transported to a hospital as a result of the attack. The old power plants were rebooted for temporary use while repairs to the main building are done.
===Transportation District:=== The Transportation District serves as the train maintenance hub and central train station for New Britain. The housing in the Transportation District is mostly comprised of flats above the main railroad junction. This District has the lowest population and the majority work as train pilots or engineers. ===Naval District:=== The great Naval District takes up the majority of the west coast. The Naval District is a large array of docks that go far out into the sea. It is in charge of sea travel, fishing, construction of military vessels and houses ship crew that are on standby. The crew's houses are large, decorated hotels. Fishing is now done by the R.B.N..
Open Email: Missing Boats
Close Email: Missing Boats
Captain Olivier Bradford, You need to delegate more forces to the defense of the Naval District. As of the second of January, four more boats have gone missing since Christmas. FOUR. The fact they have enough people to crew FOUR military vessels is a travesty. We need more defense. The boats weren't empty, the crew sleep on the boats. We can't let it happen again. Overall, they've stolen seven vessels and we've sunken two of them. Two of our own vessels. This doesn't account for the fact they could be building more. It's unlikely but possible. In a full-force naval engagement, we'll definitely win as we still have over 100 vessels. The problem isn't that they're stealing our ships, it's that they are beginning to steal more and more. Where are they getting all these people from? Sincerely, Carl Custer Postscript: We've found Private Stone and Private Septus. They were both thrown overboard at sea. Septus didn't survive. We've sent Samuel to the hospital. Thought you'd want to know.
Open Email: RE:Missing Boats
Close Email: RE:Missing Boats
Commodore Carl Custer, I will assign Sebastien and Brand's sections to guard the boats. As for Stone and Septus, we're glad you found them because the R.E.U.S.S. was starting to hound us about it. Charleston was insistent on finding their bodies. You know the [[Level 143.1#Clockwork Adaptation Cycle:|Timekeeper]] type, always so insistent on getting things perfect. He'll also probably be glad to hear that Sam survived. You didn't happen to find Private Nicholas or Private Killian, did you? Sincerely, Olivier Bradford
===Military District:=== The Military District takes up a large amount of the northwest area of New Britain. Rigorous training takes place regularly and the area itself is heavily restricted. Information about this location is not public information. Enlist in the R.C.T.D. today. We need your help.
Open Email: Surprise Reinforcements
Close Email: Surprise Reinforcements
Supreme Military General, The M.E.G. sent us a large amount of their Team D-2. Out of nowhere. They also brought a large amount of military supplies, including explosives and much higher-grade armour. The terrorists have begun forming land bases again so we appreciate the help. Simply just updating. Sincerely, Olivier Bradford
===Capital District:=== Our Capital District is at the center of New Britain. It has glorious sky-scraping towers constructed of concrete. Intricate mouldings litter the bases of the buildings. Leaders, rich people, commanders and politicians reside here. It is the absolute highest honour to reside here. Lovely parks and reserves spot the glorious Capital. Interestingly, the tall towers were meant to cram as many people as possible into one location as we hadn't claimed the entire level yet. Now, they have been renovated to make as much space as possible for our glorious elite members.
Open "Royal Newsletter" News Article: 7th of January 2026
Close "Royal Newsletter" News Article: 7th of January 2026
{{Content Warning|bad_content=Torture, Murder|page= News: =Executions in Capital District= The Capital District was briefly opened to the rest of the districts for a shocking sight on the 4th of January. The public torture and execution of terrorists in the Capital Plaza. In a brutal display that lasted a grueling 23 hours, over 350 terrorists were hung, drawn and quartered in public in sets of 10 at a time. The public had largely mixed expressions. A poll run by the government the morning after showed that 76% of registered civilians enjoyed or were otherwise satisfied with the display while only 24% were distgusted or otherwise appalled. The R.B.M. came out with a statement, "We did not want to do this but the problem has gotten out of hand. The prisons are filling up and we simply cannot account for the terrorists anymore. They are trying to make a joke out of us and we have tried to accommodate them to the best of our ability. Hopefully, this will ensure that the others will think twice before trying to hurt us again. This will be done for every single terrorist that we capture until the problem subsides." A fairly large divide between people has formed. Approximately half of civilians are defending the government's actions, agreeing that the problem has gotten out of hand. A large amount of the people have experienced firsthand these terrorist attacks and the rest are comprised of the upper echelon of people who mainly reside in the Capital District. Approximately 1 eighth of civilians are strongly against it, saying it is barbaric and wrong. They argue that it is a suppression of free speech despite the sheer nature of these attacks. The rest of civilians are staying out of both of these groups out of fear of escalation. The government urges us to not let tensions increase because we cannot be after each other when there is a larger and ever-present threat. The Capital District was subsequently locked down again immediately after. An important detail to be brought up is the extreme nature of the crimes. A list of some of the crimes is provided below. Extreme Crimes: :Assault and torture of several children under the age of 5 :Arson or attempted arson and demolition or attempted demolition of public landmarks, offices and residential buildings :The assault and kidnapping of officers of law who were then burned, waterboarded and tossed, tied up, into the ocean. Not to separate individuals. :Carrying a gun into residential homes and extorting them for their lives. The R.B.M. assures everyone that all of the executed have at least one count of murder. ==Value of R.B.P. Increases Significantly== As a result of a large amount of the money being destroyed, defaced or otherwise lost, wages are dropping harshly and product prices are slow to catch up. Basic amenities, like food and water are lowering in price at a much slower rate. However, the GDP and GDP per capita has increased. Supply now supersedes demand and export has grown. However, these supplies are mostly consumer goods as the previous main export, building materials, has taken a massive hit. Previously a fantastic exporter of all kinds of building materials, lumber, stone and metal, the increased demand for building maintenance and repairs has caused a reduction in exported materials, from an average of over 50 cubic metres of each material monthly to less than 15 monthly, except for metal, which has only decreased to 26 monthly. }}
==Landmarks:== ===Tall Tom:=== A tall clocktower inspired by the glorious architecture of Big Ben. It is much less advanced but it is still our pride. It is located in the Capital District. Due to frequent [[The Halloween Party|accidents]], Tall Tom is currently closed off as well as the Royal Hall it's connected to. Trespassing on this property is treason.
Open Incident: 82–O0
Close Incident: 82–O0
05/11/2025 09:11. Two improvised incendiary explosives were planted at the base of Tall Tom and detonated. Several civilians celebrating bonfire night near Tall Tom either died or suffered from severe, disfiguring burns. The culprits were caught and apprehended and a crackdown was put in place. Nobody is allowed near Tall Tom for reasons of safety. Luckily, the great tower was saved. Rumours about a second bomber arriving are likely falsifications. Do not believe them.
===Royal Exploration Research Center:=== A large research complex and the main one utilised by the Royal Exploration Unit. Sells bobbleheads of the head researcher and other items in its gift shop. Tours are currently closed.
Open Case File: 1617–51QJ Extract
Close Case File: 1617–51QJ Extract
====Investigation of [[The Halloween Party]] and [[Atrego]]. Designation Case 1617–51QJ. R.C.T.D. Designation. Case 01:====
28/11/2025 09:21. The raid was successful, the entire place was cleared top to bottom. 189 terrorist casualties. 7 captured. No innocent deaths. 15 personnel lost: R.C.T.D. Pvt. Roberts, Orion K.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. Hayfidd, Ben K.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. York, Killian M.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. York, Matthew K.I.A. R.C.T.D. Pvt. Bergenstein, George K.I.A. R.B.M. Pvt. Columbus, Christophe K.I.A. R.B.M. Pvt. Armstrong, Nicklas K.I.A. R.B.M. Pvt. Fletcher, Nicholas M.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Taurus, David K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Dixie, Lawrence K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Septus, Sixer M.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Robertson, Thomas K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Tomson, Robert K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Fransisco, Francis K.I.A. R.B.A. Pvt. Stone, Samuel M.I.A. R.B.A. L.Cpl. Cage, Chris K.I.A. All things considered, a substantial dent has been made and the captured will likely provide valuable intel.
==Entities:== Occasional reported entity sightings. Actively being suppressed. ==Colonies and Outposts:== {{User:Chrisonmagic/Royal Colony|Name=New Britain|Population=~255,000|Info=Our home. The beginning of [[Royal Exploration Unit|our]] journey to colonising the Backrooms and establishing a Backrooms-wide, interconnected community. Welcome to New Britain.}} The People's Republic of New Britain also resides here since [[Level 248/War|the 23rd of March]]. ==Entrances and Exits:== ===Entrances:=== *Getting lost in the mountains of [[Level 246]] might lead one here. *Travelling long enough in any direction in an ocean level can lead here. *Dreaming about Britain can send you here. *No-clipping through a map of Great Britain takes you here. ===Exits:=== *Simply leaving the island towards the ocean will lead you to [[Level 7]]. *Getting lost in the woods has a chance of leading you to [[Level 888]]. *Getting lost in a wheat field can lead to [[Level 10]]. *Falling asleep in a garden can lead you to [[Level 247]].
'''Warning. The aforementioned document is sourced from within the level but is confirmed to be accurate. Protocol requires us to create an objective view.'''

'''Close MEG Article:'''
== Level 248 is the 249th level of the Backrooms. {{Class 1|class=1f - Factions|hexagon=F|entity=Low conflict zone. Powerful factions.}} Level 248 takes on the appearance of an island surrounded by an ocean that resembles Great Britain from [[The Frontrooms]]. The level contains large veins of an unidentified mineral. Below the surface of dirt, there is a large amount of concrete with cave systems below. A large group of wanderers have inhabited the level, calling themselves the R.E.U. (or Royal Exploration Unit). The R.E.U. is a neutral wanderer faction that believes that they are part of a new British Empire. Most, if not all of them were born in the Backrooms and have British ancestry. The group is getting quite large and if you come here by mistake, they are usually very kind in helping you navigate the level and leave it. Some higher-up members of the R.E.U. recall that the old name of the group was "New Britain". It was renamed to avoid confusion with the level they now inhabited. Based on this information, the REU could have possibly have existed since 1875. The R.E.U. has an in-depth legal system, laws and government which includes punishments for crime which includes jail time, fines and even execution. There are several branches to the R.E.U., these branches can be viewed on their [[Royal Exploration Unit|Database Page]]. ==Entities:== *Controlled entity population. ==Communities and Outposts:== *The REU/"New Britain" *:Population: ~255,000. *People's Republic of New Britain/"Capita" *:Population: ~40,000. ==Entrances and Exits:== ===Entrances:=== *Getting lost in the mountains of [[Level 246]] can lead here. *Traveling far enough in [[Level 7]] can lead you here. *If you have British blood, dreaming about Britain can lead you here. *No-clipping through a map of Britain or this level can lead you here. ===Exits:=== *Leaving the island via the ocean always leads to [[Level 7]]. *Getting lost in a forest on this level will lead you to [[Level 888]]. *Getting lost in a wheat field leads you to [[Level 10]]. *Falling asleep in a garden-like area can take you to [[Level 247]].
